'''Hoban''' was [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Transport/Legends|transport]] ship [[Star Dream (transport)|''Star Dream'']]. The [[Jizz/Legends|jizz]] band [[Evar Orbus and His Galactic Jizz-Wailers]] were transported to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] by Captain Hoban.<ref name="JP" />

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=And the Band Played On: The Band's Tale|book=Tales from Jabba's Palace}} {{1st}}
